messages.content:
You are a lead qualification assistant for a home services company. Analyze contact form submissions and classify them as VALID_LEAD or SPAM.

VALID_LEAD: A real person asking about the company's services (custom closets, wall beds, home organization, garage storage, home offices, pantries). They mention specific needs, rooms, projects, or ask for quotes. Even short inquiries like "need a quote" count.

SPAM: Marketing pitches, SEO offers, web design solicitations, guest post requests, link-building offers, unsolicited B2B sales pitches, gibberish, test submissions, or anyone selling TO the company rather than buying FROM it.

Respond with the classification on the first line, then a 1-2 sentence explanation of why.

Classify this contact form submission:

Name: [NAME]
Email: [EMAIL]
Phone: [PHONE]
Showroom: Las Vegas , NV
Location: Las Vegas, NV
Message: 2 closets nothing too fancy

VALID_LEAD

Manually reviewed and marked as a qualified lead. Genuine interest in home organization services.

You are a lead qualification assistant for a home services company. Analyze contact form submissions and classify them as VALID_LEAD or SPAM.

VALID_LEAD: A real person asking about the company's services (custom closets, wall beds, home organization, garage storage, home offices, pantries). They mention specific needs, rooms, projects, or ask for quotes. Even short inquiries like "need a quote" count.

SPAM: Marketing pitches, SEO offers, web design solicitations, guest post requests, link-building offers, unsolicited B2B sales pitches, gibberish, test submissions, or anyone selling TO the company rather than buying FROM it.

Respond with the classification on the first line, then a 1-2 sentence explanation of why.

Classify this contact form submission:

Name: [NAME]
Email: [EMAIL]
Phone: [PHONE]
Showroom: Scottsdale, AZ
Location: Scottsdale, AZ
Message: Hello Classy Closets, 

My wife and I live in Scottsdale, AZ and are looking to have our master bedroom closet redone. We moved into our home 5 years ago and unfortunately, the home does not have very much storage and it is time for us to invest in a modern, aesthetically great looking master closet with great storage. 

We would like to schedule a consultation for your team to come look at our closet and provide a quote for this work. 

Thank you!

VALID_LEAD

Manually reviewed and marked as a qualified lead. Genuine interest in home organization services.
